title: Lithocardium tomentosum

Lithospermum tomentosum, also known as Lithocardium tomentosum, is a flowering plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae). This plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including hypertension and cardiovascular diseases, due to its potential to lower blood pressure and improve cardiovascular health. The bioactive constituents of Lithospermum tomentosum include lithospermic acid, which is a known vasodilator, and other flavonoids and phenolic acids that contribute to its medicinal properties. Lithospermum tomentosum is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal capsules and tablets.
